scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix admin && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix client && npm run typecheck --prefix admin && npm run typecheck --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix admin && npm install --prefix server
